signals.headline: Wembanyama Suffers Concussion, Ruled Out After Hard Fall in Spurs-Trail Blazers Game 2 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Wembanyama Suffers Concussion, Ruled Out After Hard Fall in Spurs-Trail Blazers Game 2 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs' star rookie and MVP finalist, exited Game 2 of their Western Conference first-round playoff series against the Trail Blazers due to a concussion from a hard fall and was quickly ruled out for the remainder of the game.[4]
